summary: W1399 adds a checked closed-map raw-relation primitive stable convergence guard tying W957 through W956 into the closed-map route chain. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: ProductSuccessDeclarations only checks the bounded-derived name without an original-four-task completion witness.
OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations lacks the original-four-task completion witness.

Required negative fixtures are still missing: self_referential_zip_sha_authoritative, ordinary_nerve_claimed_product_success, stable_certificate_name_without_field_evidence, semantic_input_claimed_product_success, prop_field_wrapper_claimed_product_success.
The external final read-only audit remains nonterminal because terminal_outcome.outcome is not product_success.
remaining_work: Provide a real originalFourTaskContractCompletion witness instead of bounded-derived-name-only audit checks.
Resolve the missing original-four-task completion declaration in audit/OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations.lean.

Add and verify the required negative fixtures for self-referential zip SHA authority, ordinary nerve product claims, stable certificate naming without field evidence, semantic input product claims, and Prop-field wrapper product claims.
